candidate_roles: Build a conservative, validator-safe full-object reconstruction with all large volumes attached.
Build a feature-rich variant emphasizing repeated small parts, holes, spokes, handles, and surface details.
Build a silhouette-first variant emphasizing the exact outline and major proportions.
Build an orientation-first variant emphasizing correct axes, ground contact, and functional attachments.
Build a material/color-first variant emphasizing material separation and reference colors.
Build a robust fallback variant that keeps object identity obvious even if details are simplified.
Extra candidate: repair likely weak identity by adding the most object-defining missing parts.
Extra candidate: repair likely low-survivor failure with simpler geometry and strict validator safety.
system_prompt: Portfolio strategy: adaptive-lite. Spend extra modeling detail only when the core object identity or rendered survivor quality is weak. Favor a conservative valid reconstruction with more attached, visible parts rather than a complex fragile one.
title: Adaptive-Lite Budget
